data.title: Tech Stocks Rebound, Tesla Soars To Best Day Since March 2021, Gold Rises As Treasury Yields Ease: What's Driving Markets Thursday?
data.description: Tech stocks outperformed on Thursday, driven by Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA), which skyrocketed 18% in midday trading following stronger-than-expected quarterly financial results.

data.title: Price Over Earnings Overview: Axon Enterprise
FDA Launches Investigation Into McDonald's Supplier Taylor Farms Following E. Coli Outbreak
data.description: The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has launched an investigation into Taylor Farms, a supplier for McDonald's Corporation (NYSE:MCD), after multiple people fell ill with E. coli linked to the restaurant chain's Quarter Pounder.
